permission.name: Data Field Alert
permission.description: Permission to push alert from a datafield

permission.name: FIT Contributor
permission.description: Permission to add data to fit files

permission.name: Sensor History
permission.description: Permission to access historical sensor data

permission.name: User Profile
permission.description: Permission to access the user's profile

newProjectFileMap.name: Simple
newProjectFileMap.description: A simple watch face that displays the time in a digital format centered in the middle of the screen.

newProjectFileMap.name: Simple with Settings
newProjectFileMap.description:
A simple watch face that displays the time in a digital format centered in the middle of the screen.
There are also settings for the background color, foreground color and whether or not to draw 24 hour time in a military format.

newProjectFileMap.name: Simple
newProjectFileMap.description: A data field that extends the SimpleDataField class.

newProjectFileMap.name: Complex
newProjectFileMap.description:
A data field that extends the DataField class.
This template uses Connect IQ 1.2.0 APIs and will not run on devices that haven't been updated to support 1.2.0 or higher.

newProjectFileMap.name: Simple
newProjectFileMap.description: A simple widget that draws a monkey in the middle of the screen.

newProjectFileMap.name: Simple
newProjectFileMap.description: A simple watch app that draws a monkey and implements a menu.

newProjectFileMap.name: Simple
newProjectFileMap.description: A simple audio content provider app.
